title: Safeguarding Alaska’s Public Lands and Waters from Industrial Scale Mining
summary: Since the 1950s, Alaska’s economy has relied on boom and bust extractive industries. title: Dr. Peter Winsor takes the helm as the League’s next executive director
summary: On February 7, Alaska Wilderness League was pleased to announce the selection of Dr. Peter Winsor as its next executive director. And we’re happy to share that Peter is now officially on board and leading the team as we work to protect Alaska’s wild places. Peter grew up on the west coast of Sweden and early on developed a love for nature and outdoor adventures. After completing his...
